n%2FNoteForwardIcon%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGV0aXRpb24vcC9maXNrZXItZnViYXI_.PDuWXPDKfnLqMfuNBQDWzaQR3WmjTdn8iOSINmGiUCc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)[READ APP![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideArrowUpRight%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://open.substack.com/pub/petition/p/fisker-fubar?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_1156,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F76c814bc-352b-44d1-a41c-95eb6521c325_6500x4335.jpeg)](https://substack.com/redirect/c9704eb4-2d6c-4c48-bc61-f4b9fd3d3a98?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: Getty Images

On June 17, 2024, CA-based **Fisker Group Inc.** filed a bankruptcy petition in the District of Delaware.\*

Like. That’s it. A petition.

Two days later we saw five more affiliates — including the publicly-traded entity\*\* — file petitions but it took until the morning of the first day hearing on June 21, 2024 to get a [first day declaration](https://substack.com/redirect/1c7715c2-8497-4d0e-ac22-379807e43726?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8).

We’ve covered this name previously:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_140,h_140,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep,g_auto/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F020b56c5-034b-42d8-acdd-8b1fa6892781_1024x644.jpeg)](https://substack.com/redirect/2932b056-f728-483c-9988-4d5c56bbca7d?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

#### [💥Special Double Edition: Where's the Auto Distress?💥](https://substack.com/redirect/2932b056-f728-483c-9988-4d5c56bbca7d?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

[PETITION LLC](https://substack.com/profile/2076-petition-llc)

·

Mar 17

Read full story

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_140,h_140,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep,g_auto/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F07b4c83b-f4e9-40cb-99a7-a900b2ff2410_1500x500.jpeg)](https://substack.com/redirect/0ba290a1-0c77-49bb-b17c-962f8b190336?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

#### [💥Manufacturing Something Other than Cars💥](https://substack.com/redirect/0ba290a1-0c77-49bb-b17c-962f8b190336?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Mar 20

Read full story

You can review it. But look, the bottom line is that this thing just sucked. There really isn’t anything else to say. The company closed a SPAC transaction in October ‘20 and projected 51k units/year by ‘23. The actual number? 10.2k.

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_392,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_lossy/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F468213d7-d5f4-45e4-9658-152adc44c791_480x400.gif)](https://substack.com/redirect/26cb3ef1-43a2-4fbb-ba98-7e2ff1d28c33?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: GIPHY.

To put a finer point on it, the debtors’ operating revenue was $273mm in ‘23. Against net losses of $940mm.

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_320,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_lossy/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Facf3f3a0-057e-44e5-87b7-30abe122328a_312x200.gif)](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd5b222-92b3-43b3-8148-b2f48995ae65?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: GIPHY. Basically Fisker’s performance.

Liquidity couldn’t keep up with the delays in production, nobody was interested in extending additional money, talks of a partnership with an OEM sputtered … yada yada yada … and we end up with chapter 11 cases that contemplate a liquidation of the debtors.

But the real interesting part of this story isn’t the production issues or the cars themselves — that sh\*t has been covered, including by us, ad nauseum. What’s more interesting at this point is that, above it all, there’s some good ol’ fashioned yet two-bit lender on lender violence!

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_480,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_lossy/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fae09c139-5958-488a-abcc-26fe62cfce65_480x270.gif)](https://substack.com/redirect/17cc0d6d-d1f8-413c-ac6b-eb1eda78f1ca?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: GIPHY...
